channel.title: Gallery on Wesole Nutki - Preschool
channel.description: Recent content in Gallery on Wesole Nutki - Preschool

item.title: Autumn Family Festival
item.description: Our annual autumn family festival was full of attractions! Together with parents and children, we had fun with music, created autumn decorations, and tasted delicious treats.

item.title: Daily Activities at Preschool
item.description: Take a peek at our daily activities! Art, music, physical play, and much more - every day at Wesole Nutki preschool is full of joy and learning.

item.title: Spring Trip to the Park
item.description: Our spring trip to the park was full of adventures! Children had the opportunity to observe awakening nature, play outdoors, and enjoy the beautiful spring weather.

item.title: Christmas Performance
item.description: A magical Christmas performance prepared by our preschoolers. Children showcased their artistic talents by singing carols and performing Christmas scenes.
